add_on.description: List of add-on configurations, each containing snapshot time, status, and type. Must comply with the object structure provided.

availability_zone.description: Specifies the AWS availability zone where the resource will be created. Must be a valid zone for the selected region.

blueprint_id.description: Identifier for the blueprint to use for the resource. Must match an existing blueprint in the account.

bundle_id.description: Identifier for the bundle specifying the resource's hardware and pricing. Must correspond to a valid bundle in the account.

ip_address_type.description: Type of IP address to assign to the resource (e.g., IPv4 or IPv6). Optional field.

key_pair_name.description: Optional name of the key pair to associate with the resource for SSH access. Must exist in the AWS account.

name.description: Name of the resource to be created. Must be unique within the account.

tags.description: Optional key-value pairs for tagging the resource. Keys and values must be strings.

user_data.description: Optional user-provided script to configure the instance at launch. Must be a valid string, typically a shell script.
